conn_share_type.description: The conn share type of the database instance connection.

created_at.description: The timestamp when the database instance connection was created, in RFC3339 format.

database_name.description: The database name of the database instance connection.

datastore_version.description: The datastore version of the database instance connection.

description.description: The description of the database instance connection.

engine_type.description: The engine type of the database instance connection.

expired_at.description: The timestamp when the database instance connection expires, in RFC3339 format.

id.description: The resource ID, in UUID format.

instance_id.description: The ID of the instance to which the database instance connection belongs.

instance_name.description: The instance name of the database instance connection.

ip_address.description: The ip address of the database instance connection.

is_save_password.description: Whether to save the password for the database instance connection.

network_type.description: The network type of the database instance connection.

node_ids.description: The unique identifiers of the instance nodes.

password.description: The password of the database instance connection.

port.description: The port of the database instance connection.

region.description: The region where the database instance connection is located.

shared_user_id.description: The shared user ID of the database instance connection.

shared_user_name.description: The shared user name of the database instance connection.

sql_record_flag.description: Whether SQL recording is enabled for the database instance connection.

status.description: The status of the database instance connection.

username.description: The username of the database instance connection.
